title: Smoke — KPI strip + tables
subtitle: Install smoke test. Verifies dashboards_raw → MV → dashboards round-trip and the kpi-strip + table renderers.

panels.query: SELECT 7 AS rows, 3 AS distinct_kinds, 'ok' AS health

panels.title: Letters
panels.query: SELECT arrayJoin(['a','b','c','d','e']) AS letter, length(letter) AS len

panels.title: Numbers
panels.query: SELECT number AS n, number * number AS squared FROM numbers(5)
